rs-grid
  • Home
  • Docs
  • GitHub ↗
Rust · WASM · Canvas2D

rs-grid

High-performance data grid engine built in Rust,
compiled to WebAssembly, rendered on Canvas.

Get started GitHub ↗
⚡

Virtualized viewport

Renders only visible cells. Handles millions of rows at constant memory with O(log n) hit-testing.

🦀

Rust core, zero deps

rs-grid-core is pure Rust with no WASM dependency. Business logic is fully testable natively.

🎨

Renderer-agnostic

Scene primitives are decoupled from rendering. Swap Canvas2D for WebGL or any future backend.

🧩

Leptos integration

Drop-in <GridCanvas> component for Leptos CSR. CSS-variable theming out of the box.

Architecture

GridState ──► SceneBuilder ──► SceneFrame ──► CanvasRenderer ──► <canvas>
Crate Role
rs-grid-core Headless logic: model, viewport, selection, hit-testing
rs-grid-scene Converts GridState to renderer-agnostic primitives
rs-grid-render-canvas Canvas2D backend via wasm-bindgen
rs-grid-web Browser integration: events, DPR, rAF loop, CSS theme
rs-grid-leptos Leptos CSR component wrapper

rs-grid — Rust/WASM data grid engine · GitHub
